data.name: Principal Product Manager
data.jobDescription:
Overview


This is a rare opportunity for a breadth and depth PM who works across large web scale search products as well as breakthrough Copilot product areas. 
We are looking for a Principal Product Manager (IC) to drive a core product area within Microsoft’s AI-powered consumer health experiences across Bing and Copilot. This role sits in Hyderabad and operates in a highly collaborative, cross-geo environment with close partners in the UK and US. This is a role for an IC PM who brings depth - to credibly drive decisions with engineering, design, data science, and AI partners - and breadth - to contribute meaningfully to a larger product and platform blueprint. Success in this role requires exceptional written and verbal communication, solid product judgment, and the ability to lead through written docs/canvases, in a globally distributed operating model.

At Microsoft AI, we are building an AI companion that combines extraordinary capability, real personality and emotional intelligence - grounded in credible, trusted information - to define the next wave of AI and super-intelligence. Within this org, the MAI Health team is focused on helping millions of users better understand and proactively manage their health and wellbeing, while ensuring Microsoft’s AI models and services are useful, trusted, and safe across diverse health journeys.

Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.  

Starting January 26, 2026, Microsoft AI (MAI) employees who live within a 50- mile commute of a designated Microsoft office in the U.S. or 25-mile commute of a non-U.S., country-specific location are expected to work from the office at least four days per week. This expectation is subject to local law and may vary by jurisdiction.



Responsibilities

 

  • Own a product area end-to-end, developing deep understanding of user needs and behaviors, defining product strategy and requirements, and driving execution for AI-powered consumer health experiences including AI workflows, Evals etc,.
  • Translate business objectives into clear product strategy, user experience direction, and technical requirements in close partnership with design, engineering, data science, and AI model teams.
  • Break down complex, ambiguous problem spaces into phased, executable plans and lead cross-functional teams from concept to high-quality, globally scaled delivery.
  • Drive solid cross-functional execution through effective communication, dependency management, scoping, scheduling, and collaboration with engineering, design, clinical, and research partners.
  • Define success metrics and performance indicators; design and oversee experiments; evaluate outcomes using data, experimentation, and user research.
  • Set and uphold a high bar for product quality, usability, and trust, delivering consumer-grade experiences at global scale.
  • Contribute beyond your immediate area through best practices in product & technical depth, and operating rhythm across Bing and Copilot Health initiatives.


Qualifications


Required

  • Bachelor's Degree, MS/MBA  AND 10+ years experience in product management, with deep technical fluency (DS & Engg.).
  • Exceptional written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to clearly articulate high altitude strategy as well as lowest level technical details.
  • Demonstrated success operating from a remote or distributed product location, partnering closely with leadership, stakeholders and teams based in the UK and US.
  • Solid cross-geo, upward, and outward stakeholder management experience, with a proven ability to navigate and execute within a highly matrixed organization.
  • Experience building or scaling large, consumer-facing products, preferably in web-scale systems such as Search, AI-driven platforms, or healthcare consumer experiences.
  • Ability to own your work in a fast-paced, rapid growth environment, manage multiple priorities, and adapt to an ever-changing landscape.
  • Experience working with LLMs, GenAI systems, or applied AI products.
  • Experience working in large technology companies or scaled consumer product organizations.

#MicrosoftAI


This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.



Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process, read more about requesting accommodations.

blogs.title: Microsoft Sovereign Cloud adds governance, productivity and support for large AI models securely ru
blogs.description: As digital sovereignty becomes a strategic requirement, organizations are rethinking how they deploy critical infrastructure and AI capabilities under tighter regulatory expectations and higher risk conditions. Microsoft’s approach to sovereignty is grounded in enabling enterprises, public sectors and regulated industries to participate in the digital economy securely, independently and on their own terms. The Microsoft Sovereign Cloud brings together productivity, security and cloud workloads to span both... The post  Microsoft Sovereign Cloud adds governance, productivity and support for large AI models securely running even when completely disconnected   appeared first on  The Official Microsoft Blog .

blogs.title: Maia 200: The AI accelerator built for inference
blogs.description: Today, we’re proud to introduce Maia 200, a breakthrough inference accelerator engineered to dramatically improve the economics of AI token generation. Maia 200 is an AI inference powerhouse: an accelerator built on TSMC’s 3nm process with native FP8/FP4 tensor cores, a redesigned memory system with 216GB HBM3e at 7 TB/s and 272MB of on-chip SRAM, plus...
